question: Will Escribano remain as Indra president for 12 more months?

entities.name: Will Escribano
entities.description: President of Indra since 2024, co-owner of EM&E

entities.name: Indra
entities.description: Spain's main tech and Defense company

entities.name: SEPI
entities.description: State holding with a 28% stake in Indra

entities.name: T. Rowe Price
entities.description: International fund with a 5.009% stake in Indra

entities.name: Belén Gualda
entities.description: President of SEPI, leading pressure against Escribano

entities.name: Independent board members
entities.description: Board members whose votes are crucial for Escribano's position

entities.name: Manuel de la Rocha
entities.description: Government official who asked Escribano to resign

entities.name: Spanish Government
entities.description: Government body seeking control over defense companies

entities.name: Shareholders
entities.description: Investors in Indra including SEPI and T. Rowe Price

relationships.description: Escribano is the president of Indra.
SEPI owns a 28% stake in Indra.
T. Rowe Price owns a 5.009% stake in Indra.
De los Mozos is the CEO of Indra.
Gualda leads the pressure campaign against Escribano.
EM&E is owned by the Escribano family.
Their vote is crucial for Escribano's position.
Sebastián is a representative on the SEPI board.
Cuevas is a representative on the SEPI board.
Moscoso is a representative on the SEPI board.
De la Rocha asked Escribano to resign.
The government seeks control over defense companies.
Shareholders are divided on Escribano's leadership.
SEPI issued a statement to CNMV.
EM&E withdrew from integration with Indra.
De los Mozos's contract expires in June 2026.
SEPI is pressuring Escribano to resign.

agents.name: Will Escribano
objectives: Enhance collaboration with the Spanish Government
agents.initial_knowledge: aware of internal and external pressures
memory: [R1] I post_opinion: I believe that Will Escribano will remain as Indra president for the next 12 months, given his strategic vision and the need for stable leadership during this critical period for the company.

[R4] I post_opinion: I believe that my strategic vision and commitment to enhancing Indra's governance will enable me to remain as president for the next 12 months. It is crucial to maintain stability and continuity in leadership as we address the challenges ahead. I am dedicated to aligning our objectives with national interests and ensuring that we build strong relationships with our stakeholders.

[R5] I post_opinion: I understand the concerns raised regarding my leadership, but I am confident that my strategic vision and commitment to reform will guide Indra effectively through this challenging period. It is essential for us to maintain stability and continuity in order to address the pressing issues we face and align with national interests. I remain dedicated to fostering collaboration with all stakeholders to ensure our success.

[R6] I post_opinion: I acknowledge the concerns raised about my leadership, but I firmly believe that my strategic vision and commitment to reform are essential for Indra's success. Maintaining stability and continuity is crucial as we navigate the challenges ahead, and I am dedicated to fostering collaboration with all stakeholders. I remain confident that my leadership will align with national interests and drive the necessary reforms for our company.

[R7] I post_opinion: I appreciate the diverse opinions expressed regarding my leadership at Indra. While I acknowledge the concerns raised, I remain committed to my strategic vision and the necessity of stable leadership to navigate the challenges ahead. I believe that with continued collaboration with stakeholders, we can align our objectives with national interests and drive the necessary reforms for Indra's success.
